case_title: EDILBERTO MEJIA VS. ARTURO VEGA FERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2018 BY PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF EDILBERTO MEJIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARTURO VEGA FERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEJIA, EDILBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ARTURO VEGA $1,485.34 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,535.34, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $371.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JAN-30-18 AND ON THE LAST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,015.34 FILED BY MEJIA, EDILBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ARTURO VEGA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED DEC-18-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ARTURO VEGA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
